file_summary: This file defines a FastAPI router for repository-related operations including loading, indexing, and semantic search. It contains Pydantic models for request/response validation and implements endpoints for: 1) loading a repository from a given path, 2) indexing a loaded repository for semantic search, and 3) performing semantic searches within indexed repositories. Helper functions resolve repository roots and read project metadata.

line_windows.summary: Imports, router setup, and Pydantic models for repo loading, indexing, and search requests/responses.
Continuation of models, and endpoint implementations for loading and indexing repositories.
Completion of indexing endpoint, implementation of semantic search endpoint, and start of helper function to resolve repository root.
Completion of repository root resolution helper and implementation of project metadata reading helper.
